function RhombusCellCount(n: int): int\n  requires n >= 1\n{\n  SumRows(-(n - 1), n - 1, n - 1)\n}\n\n// Peel the last element from SumRows\nlemma SumRowsAppend(lo: int, hi: int, r: int)\n  requires r
